query:
-- Check supplier workbook line items for Managed Voice Support to find the wholesale cost
SELECT 
  swli.productName,
  swli.productType,
  swli.amountExGst,
  swli.amountIncGst,
  swli.matchStatus,
  swli.matchedServiceExternalId,
  siu.supplier_name,
  siu.invoice_date,
  siu.total_ex_gst
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items swli
JOIN supplier_invoice_uploads siu ON swli.upload_id = siu.id
WHERE swli.productName LIKE '%Voice Support%'
ORDER BY siu.invoice_date DESC
LIMIT 20;
